throughput._note: completion_tps is over model-API call time only, not wall (tool execution + sandbox not counted)

gpu.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition
gpu._note: power and memory captured at run START only; real values vary during the run. For truthful power, future runs need a sidecar nvidia-smi sampler.

energy_estimate._note: Upper bound: assumes GPU drew at power.limit for the entire wall time. Real draw is lower (idle between calls, peaks during decode). Treat as ceiling, not point estimate.
